---
title: "Resources"
---

This page collects useful external resources from the wider AI4SoilHealth ecosystem.

## Official websites

- [AI4SoilHealth main website](https://ai4soilhealth.eu/)
- [Soil Health Data Cube technical site](https://shdc.ai4soilhealth.eu/)

## Project work pages

The public AI4SoilHealth site presents the project around four main public-facing themes:

- [Novel in-field soil sampling tools](https://ai4soilhealth.eu/novel-in-field-soil-sampling-tools/)
- [Soil health data cube](https://ai4soilhealth.eu/soil-health-data-cube/)
- [Robust indicator framework](https://ai4soilhealth.eu/robust-indicator-framework/)
- [Testing on our pilot sites](https://ai4soilhealth.eu/our-work-new/)

## Data and technical resources

- [SHDC welcome page](https://shdc.ai4soilhealth.eu/)
- [SHDC specifications](https://shdc.ai4soilhealth.eu/1-specifications.html)
- [SHDC available layers](https://shdc.ai4soilhealth.eu/2-layers.html)
- [AI4SoilHealth GitHub organisation](https://github.com/AI4SoilHealth)

## Communication channels

- [X / Twitter](https://twitter.com/AI4SoilHealth)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/ai-4-soil-health/)
- [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@AI4SoilHealth)
- [Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/ai4soilhealth.bsky.social)

## Contact and updates

- [AI4SoilHealth contact page](https://ai4soilhealth.eu/contact-us/)
- [News on the main project site](https://ai4soilhealth.eu/)

## Why these resources matter

The toolbox is easier to understand when users can also reach the wider project ecosystem: the main project website for accessible project communication, the SHDC site for technical and spatial-data context, and the public communication channels for updates, events, and explanatory materials.
